description_long: This street food stall setup features a row of small, individual stalls with red and white striped awnings, arranged along a central pathway. The stalls are flanked by lush green trees, providing shade and a welcoming atmosphere. Each stall has a counter area facing the pathway, with some stalls displaying signage above the awnings. The ground is a flat brown surface, likely representing packed earth or pavement, and there are stone lanterns or posts marking the entrance to the central walkway. The overall layout is reminiscent of a festive outdoor market, with a focus on accessibility and visibility for customers. The use of bright colors and modular stall design suggests a lively, temporary installation suitable for events or street fairs.
description: A festive row of red and white striped street food stalls lines a central walkway, shaded by green trees and marked by stone posts, evoking a lively outdoor market atmosphere.
description_view_0: From this angle, the stalls and their striped awnings are visible behind a row of trees, with the central walkway partially obscured.
description_view_1: This view looks directly down the central walkway, showing the alignment of stalls on both sides and the stone posts at the entrance.
description_view_2: The stalls and trees are seen from the opposite side, with signage visible on some stalls and the layout of the market more apparent.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the central walkway, flanked by stalls and trees, with the stone posts clearly marking the entrance.
attribute_signage: Some stalls have rectangular signs with bold text above the awnings, primarily in white and red, placed centrally for visibility.
attribute_serving_counter: Each stall features a rectangular serving counter facing the central walkway, constructed from wood or similar material, with a flat surface for transactions and food service.
attribute_food_display: Food is likely displayed on the counters in an open-air arrangement, easily accessible to customers, but no protective cases or covers are visible.
